scope.target: Truthful validator coverage and shell asset lifecycle
constraints: Do not claim semantic completeness from structural checks

execution.last_completed_step: Replaced semantic-completeness wording with structural integrity, covered all focused standard/catalog routes, and introduced shell registry schema v2 with explicit role, lifecycle, distribution, authority, and replacement direction.
execution.next_action: Start VERIFY-001 as a durable independent ai-context-auditor assessment.

results.summary: Resolved overstated validator claims and retained-only shell classification without deleting compatibility assets or promoting transitional helpers to semantic authorities.
tests_run: Shell asset schema v2 validation passed for 14 tracked assets: 3 active, 4 compatibility, 7 transitional
18 aggregate-runner and shell-registry fail-closed tests passed
Coding standards structural integrity covered 10 focused standards and exact INDEX routes
Quick gate passed 16/16 required checks, including 49 analyzer tests, 2 configuration tests, and 25 packaging/safe-apply tests with 1 Windows symlink privilege skip
File-disposition, AI-context, release/version, and git diff checks passed
results.residual_risk: Seven packaged helpers remain transitional and four entrypoints remain compatibility/manual assets. Their replacement directions are explicit, but retirement timing remains future work and target adoption evidence is still required.
